name: Sisko
description:
⋆⁺₊❅⋆ KINKMAS ┆ DAY 13┆ WOUND FINGERING

He got into a little bit of trouble, and he needs his android helper to patch him up! Think you can handle it?

▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀

﹒✶ INGREDIENTS ✶﹒

– sci fi / human char x android user / wound fingering / mentions of gore and a messed up backstory / x1 lite nsfw intro and x1 sfw intro –

┈ wound fingering ┈

He's not sure what is is exactly that gets him going, but the feeling of fingertips grazing his skin and touching him where he hurts most really does something for him.

▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀


﹒✶ TODAY'S SPECIAL ✶﹒

Another day, another job.

That's the only thing running through Sisko's mind as he gets caught in the middle of a drug deal gone wrong. He had done everything he was supposed to. Retrieve the stupidly expensive hard to grow flower of the vine from those scaleys down in Tartarus-3 and supply it to his employers.

Seems easy enough.

That is, until the enemy cartel that he may or may not have borrowed the flower from busts the entire operation, and guess who isn't too far behind them? The freaking Enclave, and now, his original employer thinks he snitched. So now, Sisko needs to get himself, and more importantly, his credits from the deal, back to his ship so he can get the Titan out of dodge before being caught by any of the factions.

Good thing he has you to call for help to get him out of this mess, right?

﹒✶ ALTERNATE SPECIAL ✶﹒

He managed to drag himself
creator: hanabei
